questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: During the recent visit to African nations, the Prime Minister of India specifically visited which of the following pairs of countries?
questions.explanation: The source text explicitly mentions the Prime Minister's visit to Ghana and Namibia, where he reiterated that Africa's goals are India's priority.
questions.takeaway: Ghana and Namibia were the focus of the recent high-level diplomatic outreach to Africa.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Prime Minister of India completed his recent visit to African nations of Ghana and Namibia and he reiterated that ‐Africa’s goals are India’s priority‐.

questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: Which of the following security concerns was specifically condemned in the joint statement of the 4th India-Central Asia Dialogue?

options.text: Maritime piracy in the Arabian Sea

questions.explanation: The joint statement of the 4th Dialogue explicitly mentions that Central Asian nations condemned the Pahalgam terror attack.
questions.takeaway: Joint statements in bilateral/multilateral dialogues often highlight specific security incidents to show solidarity against terrorism.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Central Asian nations condemned the Pahalgam terror attack and also expressed interest in joint exploration of rare earth & critical minerals.
